invariant_features: tall, unbranched spike of drooping tubular bells
speckled throat with dark dots and pale halos
hooded upper lip over broad lower lip
one-sided (secund) flower arrangement on raceme
basal rosette of downy, serrated leaves with pronounced midrib

action_or_pose: trained as a standard tree form
invariant_features: triads of tiny white tubular flowers encircled by three papery bracts
thin, tissue-paper bracts providing the color instead of petals
hooked woody thorns along long scrambling canes
climbs by snagging with thorns rather than tendrils or twining
bracts with prominent midrib and translucent, veined texture
glossy evergreen leaves with fine serration and mucronate tips
rounded, imbricate flower buds with scale-like bracts
thick, satiny overlapping petals in a symmetrical rosette
dense central cluster of yellow stamens, often partly hidden
woody evergreen shrub bearing solitary blooms on short stalks
epicalyx of three narrow bracteoles
cheese-wheel schizocarp seed head
central staminal column
five notched petals with dark radial stripes
palmately veined round-to-lobed leaves with scalloped margins

action_or_pose: in full bloom with open trumpet flowers
invariant_features: crepe-textured purple, five-lobed funnel corolla (one-day bloom)
solitary axillary flowers on short pedicels
hygrochastic seed capsules that burst open when wet
flat disk seeds with sticky hygroscopic hairs
rhizomatous, clump-forming colonies of smooth upright stems

action_or_pose: rosette spread with central cup filled
upright flowering spike with colorful bracts
invariant_features: watertight tank-forming leaf rosette
silvery peltate leaf scales
spiny leaf margins with hooked teeth
basal offsets called pups
long-lasting bracted inflorescence

action_or_pose: in full bloom facing the sun
spherical seed head after petals drop
invariant_features: bi-color rays: red/orange centers with bright yellow tips
three-toothed, frilled ray tips
raised burgundy dome of disc florets
spiky green involucral bracts behind the rays
spherical, bristly seed head (pincushion-like)

action_or_pose: clinging to a wall via aerial rootlets
in full bloom with trumpet clusters
invariant_features: orange-scarlet flared trumpet corollas
opposite pinnate leaves with 7–11 serrated leaflets
woody vine with adventitious aerial rootlets for adhesion
inflated ribbed calyx at flower base
slender dehiscent pods with flat winged seeds

action_or_pose: in full bloom with flat, speckled stars
seed capsules split open exposing black beads
invariant_features: orange, flat, six-tepaled flowers densely freckled with red spots
split three-valved capsules revealing shiny black, blackberry-like seed clusters
basal fans of sword-shaped, equitant leaves
slender, branched wiry stems with widely spaced flowers
spent tepals twisting into corkscrew-like spirals
